description: Phase 3g feature SMARTS (tin/zinc/alkyl_halide) + 4 subfamily-guarded elif branches (Stille, Keck Asymmetric Allylation, Reformatsky, Finkelstein). 3g-1a narrowed Keck/Stille guards to exact subfamilies. 3g-1b softened Keck tin penalty (0.22 -> 0.45 when homoallyl-alcohol product signature present) + added homoallyl-alcohol boost to recover 2 coverage cases whose tin only appears in reagents_text.

iterations.name: 3g-1
iterations.notes: initial guards too broad; Keck guard matched 'Keck Radical Allylation', Stille guard matched 'Stille-Kelly Coupling' -> coverage r@5 -0.0077 regression

iterations.name: 3g-1a
iterations.notes: narrowed Keck to 'keck asymmetric allylation' exact; narrowed Stille to explicit subfamily list (Cross-Coupling + Carbonylative; excluded Kelly). Admission +0.0115 top1, but cov r@5 still -0.002 vs 3e-b-3 (2 curated Keck DB extracts with allylstannane only in reagents_text)

iterations.name: 3g-1b
iterations.notes: softened Keck tin penalty 0.22->0.45 when product shows homoallyl-alcohol signature, plus homoallyl+carbonyl boost (1.08). Recovered both lost Keck coverage cases while preserving Roush/Mukaiyama/Sakurai admission gains.
